name: generic
description: Permissive, low-confidence default. Parses dotted-numeric heading prefixes (e.g. '4.2.1 Title') but does NOT invent clause ids from ordinary prose headings. Cross-ref patterns cover the widest common phrasings (clause/section/clauses, 'see', and bare '#4.2' / '4.2.1'-style refs are intentionally NOT matched to avoid false positives on prose).
